Last night | had a dream. In the dream |
was given the solution to a staffing problem I'd been presented
with JUST YESTERDAY. The problem is of a confidential nature
and must therefore remain unclarified here, but | can assure you
that the method through which | received this helpful information
was undeniably paranatural.
| can only draw the conclusion that | possess exceptional
precognitive abilities and as such, offer my services to the Bureau's
research teams. We must utilize my powers for the greater good.
Signed,
Mr. Francis Bertram
